description: A strip/bar-code plot: one tick per detail-grain member along an aggregated measure axis, grouped by a category on rows.

slots.notes: template aggregates Sales with Avg (not Sum): [avg:Sales:qk].
detail/grain dimension carrying semantic-role='[Country].[ISO3166_2]'; the geo semantic-role is a cosmetic hint carried onto the target.
detail/grain dimension carrying semantic-role='[State].[Name]'; cosmetic hint carried onto the target.

hazards.detail: [Country/Region] and [State/Province] carry semantic-role attributes; these are not rewritten by replaceFieldReferences and are carried onto the target fields. They define mark grain, not a geographic map. Verification report agrees the readiness is GREEN (contrast spatial-filled-map which stays YELLOW).
